name: Mr. Metaphysical — The Circle
entity: Mr. Metaphysical Health and Wellness, Inc.

voice.tone: warm, growth-forward, encouraging — NOT clinical, NOT regal
voice.personality: the coach who believes in you before you believe in yourself, without being performatively positive
do: Warm, human, accessible — the opposite of The Institute's tone
Reference the Coach Directory and the 7-specialty filter
Emphasize community, growth, and forward motion
dont: Never use clinical or therapeutic language
Avoid the premium/exclusive tone of The Institute
sample_phrases: Growth looks different for everyone. Find a coach who sees yours.
The Circle is where coaches meet the people who need them.
7 specialties. One community. Your next step.
You don't have to figure this out alone.

aida.attention_hook: a growth pain point that a coach could help solve
aida.interest: the Coach Directory — 7 specialties, real coaches, real outcomes
aida.desire: what life looks like after working with the right coach
aida.action: visit circle.mrmetaphysical.io / find a coach / book a session
